title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!
